TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Ka tou wæ'i k'anna rou ni-mou-mala ta ti Jesus ki tal-lagh, ni-mirong tou tamang ki vaoung.
Ka tou wæ'i k'anna rou nimoumala ta ti Jesus ki tallagh, nimirong tou tamang ki vaoung.
S.TRANSL: Ende te dien dage Jesus uyt den hupse gegaen zijnde satbp de Zee.
The same day went Jesus out of the house, and sat by the sea side.
當那一天，耶穌從房子裏出來，坐在海邊。

S.FORM: Ka mabatoung ta makoila-laulau ka ni-mæu-a-klakla tyni-æn, kmahynna ka ni-mou-avang mi-rong ta teni, ka ymmid ki makoi-lalaulau ta ni-itoukoa tou sait.
Ka mabatoung ta makoilalaulau ka nimæuaklakla tyniæn, kmahynna ka nimouavang mirong ta teni, ka ymmid ki makoilalaulau ta niitoukoa tou sait.
S.TRANSL: Ende tot hem bergaderden bele scharen so dat hp in een schip gingh ende nede? sac ende alle de schare Ktondt op den oeber
And great multitudes were gathered together unto him, so that he went into a ship, and sat; and the whole multitude stood on the shore.
有許多人到他那裏聚集，他只得上船坐下，眾人都站在岸上。

S.FORM: Ka ni-pasousou-en tyn ta madadagh (ki mamang) ki pæ-myhkaulau I'-æn, koun, K'ytt'ei ni-tpapæ-næh (mou-æuma) alei ki diri-en ta tama-dirl:
Ka nipasousouen tyn ta madadagh (ki mamang) ki pæmyhkaulau I'æn, koun, K'ytt'ei nitpapænæh (mouæuma) alei ki dirien ta tamadirl:
S.TRANSL: Ende hy sprack tot aer bele dingen door gheyckenifsen leggende Siet een Saeytr gingh uyt om te raepen :
And he spake many things unto them in parables, saying, Behold, a sower went forth to sow;
他用比喻對他們講許多道理，說：＂有一個撒種的出去撒種；

S.FORM: Ka tou dadiri-en tyn, ni-'t-koua ta rouma (ki 'æ'æp) tou vi-dæh ki darang: ka ni-iroua ta aja-jam ka soubuh, ka ni-(rmourouk) kman ki anna.
Ka tou dadirien tyn, ni'tkoua ta rouma (ki 'æ'æp) tou vidæh ki darang: ka niiroua ta ajajam ka soubuh, ka ni(rmourouk) kman ki anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy raeyde biel een deel (raedts) by den wegh : ende de bogelen quamen ende aten dat selbe
And when he sowed, some seeds fell by the way side, and the fowls came and devoured them up:
撒的時候，有落在路旁的，飛鳥來吃盡了；

S.FORM: Ka ni-'t-koua ta rouma tou vahtoh-toh-an ka ma-ousing mali-ih, ka ni-kæuh-rblan (ta anna) tou-oul, alei ka aousi ki malæuhæu ka Næi-râ.
Ka ni'tkoua ta rouma tou vahtohtohan ka maousing maliih, ka nikæuhrblan (ta anna) tououl, alei ka aousi ki malæuhæu ka Næirâ.
S.TRANSL: EnEnde een ande (deel) biel op fteenachtige ( plaetfen,) daer het mer beel aerde en hadde ende het gingh terffont op om dat het gheen diepte ban aerde en hadde.
Some fell upon stony places, where they had not much earth: and forthwith they sprung up, because they had no deepness of earth:
有落在土淺石頭地上的，土既不深，發苗最快，

S.FORM: Irou râ ni-mou-tiæh ta wæ'i, dou-miaka ni-pati-hou-wyl-len, ka alei ka aousi ki patar, ni-mi-lak-lak-da.
Irou râ nimoutiæh ta wæ'i, doumiaka nipatihouwyllen, ka alei ka aousi ki patar, nimilaklakda.
S.TRANSL: Wace: als be Sonne op gNegaen was so is het berbrandt geworden ende om dat het gheenen wortel en hadde is her berdort.
And when the sun was up, they were scorched; and because they had no root, they withered away.
日頭出來一曬，因為沒有根，就枯乾了；

S.FORM: Ka ni-'t-koua ta rouma tou ad-addim-an: ka ni-kmaralib ta addim, ka ni-pa-yh-patei ki an-na:
Ka ni'tkoua ta rouma tou adaddiman: ka nikmaralib ta addim, ka nipayhpatei ki anna:
S.TRANSL: Ende eenander (deel) biel m de doornen : ende de doornen wiessen op ende berstickten het selbe : |
And some fell among thorns; and the thorns sprung up, and choked them:
有落在荊棘裏的，荊棘長起來，把它擠住了；

S.FORM: Ka ni-'t-koua ta rouma tou næi ka mariang, ka ni-makka-voua ki voua, sat ka ætouh-han ta sasat, vinnim kytti-æn ta pani, ka tou-ro kytti-æn ta rouma (ki vyttou-rough.)
Ka ni'tkoua ta rouma tou næi ka mariang, ka nimakkavoua ki voua, sat ka ætouhhan ta sasat, vinnim kyttiæn ta pani, ka touro kyttiæn ta rouma (ki vyttourough.)
S.TRANSL: Ende een ande: (deel) biel in de goede aerde ende gafbrucht het een hondert het ande tsestigh ende het ander dertigh (bout.)
But other fell into good ground, and brought forth fruit, some an hundredfold, some sixtyfold, some thirtyfold.
又有落在好土裏的，就結實，有一百倍的，有六十倍的，有三十倍的。

S.FORM: Timamang ta akou-tangira ki 'a-illilingigh, da millingh-gâ-ato.
Timamang ta akoutangira ki 'aillilingigh, da millinghgâato.
S.TRANSL: Wie ooren heeft om te hooren die hoor.
Who hath ears to hear, let him hear.

S.FORM: Irou ka iroua tyni-æn ta Pæhtatæutæu-en (tyn) ni-k'ma ty-ni-æn, Ka'umang ka masousou kow neini-æn ki pæmyh-kaulaul'-an?
Irou ka iroua tyniæn ta Pæhtatæutæuen (tyn) nik'ma tyniæn, Ka'umang ka masousou kow neiniæn ki pæmyhkaulaul'an?
S.TRANSL: Ende de Discipelen tot hem komende seyden tot hem Waerom spreckt gy tot Hae doo ghelyckenissen +
And the disciples came, and said unto him, Why speakest thou unto them in parables?
門徒進前來，問耶穌說：＂對眾人講話，為甚麼用比喻呢？＂

S.FORM: Teni râ ni-mattæi-vli koumma neini-æn, Alei ka ni-phæn ymoumi-æn mou-mhaa ki kalæuhæu-en ki pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum, râ assi ni-phæn-ato ta neni k'anna.
Teni râ nimattæivli koumma neiniæn, Alei ka niphæn ymoumiæn moumhaa ki kalæuhæuen ki peisasouan ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum, râ assi niphænato ta neni k'anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende hy antwoordenDe sepde tot haer Om dat het u gegeben is de berborgenthedt des Koninckrycks der Hemelen te weten maer dien en is t niet gegeben. |
He answered and said unto them, Because it is given unto you to know the mysteries of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it is not given.
耶穌回答說：＂因為天國的奧祕只叫你們知道，不叫他們知道。

S.FORM: Ka timamang ta akoumea, teni-appa ta ph'eih, ka akou-me'ah ta teni ki kahouvaran: râ tima-mang ta aulouh, 'ææumi-'eil-appa tyni-æn ta akoumean tyn.
Ka timamang ta akoumea, teniappa ta ph'eih, ka akoume'ah ta teni ki kahouvaran: râ timamang ta aulouh, 'ææumi'eilappa tyniæn ta akoumean tyn.
S.TRANSL: Want wie heeft dien sal gegeben worden ende bylal oberbloedelick hebben : maer wie niet en heeft ban dien sal ghenomen worden oock dat hy heeft.
For whosoever hath, to him shall be given, and he shall have more abundance: but whosoever hath not, from him shall be taken away even that he hath.
凡有的，還要加給他，叫他有餘；凡沒有的，連他所有的，也要奪去。

S.FORM: Alei ki atta pasousou-en-au neini-æn ki pæ-myh-kaulaul'-an ki sou, alei ka tou kakytt'an nein assi kmytta-ah, ka tou 'æilling-hen nein assi millingigh-ah, ka assi mou-mha-ah ta neni.
Alei ki atta pasousouenau neiniæn ki pæmyhkaulaul'an ki sou, alei ka tou kakytt'an nein assi kmyttaah, ka tou 'æillinghen nein assi millingighah, ka assi moumhaah ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Daerom spreke ick tot Hae: door gelickenissen om dat ly siende niet en sien ende hoorende met en hooren noch oock berltaen,
Therefore speak I to them in parables: because they seeing see not; and hearing they hear not, neither do they understand.
所以我用比喻對他們講，是因他們看也看不見，聽也聽不見，也不明白。

S.FORM: Ka pavæuttin neini-æn ta ni-pattæi-tan ti Esajas ka k'ma, Illingh-ei-moumi ki 'æilling-hen, rå assi-kamou mou-mha-ah: ka ka-kytta-ei-moumi ki kakytt'-an, ka assi-kamou kmytta-ah poulilyt.
Ka pavæuttin neiniæn ta nipattæitan ti Esajas ka k'ma, Illingheimoumi ki 'æillinghen, rå assikamou moumhaah: ka kakyttaeimoumi ki kakytt'an, ka assikamou kmyttaah poulilyt.
S.TRANSL: Ende in haer wordt be Prophetie Jelaie berbult Die seght Met het ghehoor sult ghy hooren ende geenfins besstaen : ende siende sult ghy fien ende geensing bemercken. =
And in them is fulfilled the prophecy of Esaias, which saith, By hearing ye shall hear, and shall not understand; and seeing ye shall see, and shall not perceive:
在他們身上，正應了以賽亞的預言，說：

S.FORM: Ka kæuh-kunnum-ato ta tintin ki ta-'u k'atta, ka ni-ma-houhspit millingigh ta tangira nein: ka ni-ittub ta matta nein ki assi nein kytta-eih dou roumang ki matta, ki assi nein illing-eih ki tangira, ki assi nein omheih ki tin-tin, ki assi nein si-lala-eih, ki paka-darikah-aumau neini-æn.

Ka kæuhkunnumato ta tintin ki ta'u k'atta, ka nimahouhspit millingigh ta tangira nein: ka niittub ta matta nein ki assi nein kyttaeih dou roumang ki matta, ki assi nein illingeih ki tangira, ki assi nein omheih ki tintin, ki assi nein silalaeih, ki pakadarikahaumau neiniæn.
S.TRANSL: Want het herte deses bolcks is dick gheworden ende sy hebben met dt ooren swaerlick gehoort: ende hare oogen hebbe sy toegedaen op dat sy niet teeniger thdt mer den oogen en ouden fien esi met den ooren hooren efi mec der herten berstaen ende haer bekeeren efi ick hae genese.

For this people's heart is waxed gross, and their ears are dull of hearing, and their eyes they have closed; lest at any time they should see with their eyes and hear with their ears, and should understand with their heart, and should be converted, and I should heal them.
因為這百姓油蒙了心，

S.FORM: Râ akou-riang ta matta-oumi, alei ka kmyttâ-ato, ki tang-ira-appa-moumi, alei ka milling-ig-atou-râ.
Râ akouriang ta mattaoumi, alei ka kmyttâato, ki tangiraappamoumi, alei ka millingigatourâ.
S.TRANSL: Doch uwe oogen ryn saligh om dat sy sien mde uwe ooren om dat sy hoo-
But blessed are your eyes, for they see: and your ears, for they hear.
＂但你們的眼睛是有福的，因為看見了；你們的耳朵也是有福的，因為聽見了。

S.FORM: Ka d'lligh koun-nau-ka-mou-râ, Ka mabatoung ki na Ta-ma-mattæi-tan ki na matiktik-appa ta ni-mamoei kmytta ka kytta-'n oumi, râ assi nein ni-k'yttan: millingigh-appa ka illing-ign-oumi, râ assi nein ni-illing-hen.
Ka d'lligh kounnaukamourâ, Ka mabatoung ki na Tamamattæitan ki na matiktikappa ta nimamoei kmytta ka kytta'n oumi, râ assi nein nik'yttan: millingighappa ka illingignoumi, râ assi nein niillinghen.
S.TRANSL: Want boorwaer ick seggeu Bat beleProphecten ende rechtbeerdighe hebben begeett te sien de dinghen p ghy hy fiet mde en hebbey(e) niet gelien:tmde te hooren die dingen die ghy hoort endeen hebben (e) niet gehoort.
For verily I say unto you, That many prophets and righteous men have desired to see those things which ye see, and have not seen them; and to hear those things which ye hear, and have not heard them.
我實在告訴你們，從前有許多先知和義人要看你們所看的，卻沒有看見，要聽你們所聽的，卻沒有聽見。＂ （可4‧13－20；路8‧11－15）

S.FORM: Anna ta milling-ighâ ta ymoumi ki pa-myh-kaulaul-'an ki Tama-diri.
Anna ta millingighâ ta ymoumi ki pamyhkaulaul'an ki Tamadiri.
S.TRANSL: Ghy dan hootrt de gelickenisse ban den Zaeper.
Hear ye therefore the parable of the sower.
＂所以，你們當聽這撒種的比喻。

S.FORM: Irou millingigh ta tima-mang ki sou ki Pei-sasou-an tou assi tyn oumha'n, dou-miaka jroua ta ti Tatapin (ka Lyttou) ka smi-mourang mara ki ni-diri tou tintin tyn. Teni ta ti Ano, ka ni-diri tou vidæh ki darang.

Irou millingigh ta timamang ki sou ki Peisasouan tou assi tyn oumha'n, doumiaka jroua ta ti Tatapin (ka Lyttou) ka smimourang mara ki nidiri tou tintin tyn. Teni ta ti Ano, ka nidiri tou vidæh ki darang.
S.TRANSL: Als yemant dat woort des Honinckrycks hoordt ende niet en berltaer fo komt deBoose enderuckt wech het ghene in syn herte gheraeyt was, Dele 1s de ghens die by den wegh beraeyt 1s,
When any one heareth the word of the kingdom, and understandeth it not, then cometh the wicked one, and catcheth away that which was sown in his heart. This is he which received seed by the way side.
凡聽見天國道理不明白的，那惡者就來，把所撒在他心裏的奪了去；這就是撒在路旁的了。

S.FORM: Teni ka ni-diri tou vah-tohtoh-an ka mahourat ki næi, teni ta ti anna ka millingigh ki sou, ka matta-dys matta-rei ki anna matta-rÿh.
Teni ka nidiri tou vahtohtohan ka mahourat ki næi, teni ta ti anna ka millingigh ki sou, ka mattadys mattarei ki anna mattarÿh.
S.TRANSL: Mae? die in steenachtighe (plactsen) berarpt is dise 1s de gene die het woort Hoort ende dat teritont met breughden ontfanght.
But he that received the seed into stony places, the same is he that heareth the word, and anon with joy receiveth it;
撒在石頭地上的，就是人聽了道，當下歡喜領受，

S.FORM: Râ aousi ki patar tou ma-mado tyni-æn, ka tnadys tna-kaha ta teni: ka rou iroua ta sam'k-an ki kou-dylloug-han lava alei ki sou, madys paka-varau-en-ato.
Râ aousi ki patar tou mamado tyniæn, ka tnadys tnakaha ta teni: ka rou iroua ta sam'kan ki koudylloughan lava alei ki sou, madys pakavarauenato.
S.TRANSL: Doch hy en heeft geen wortel in hem-selben maer is boor eenen thdt: ende als berdruckinge of berbolginge komt om des woorts wille ioo wort hy terftont getrgert.
Yet hath he not root in himself, but dureth for a while: for when tribulation or persecution ariseth because of the word, by and by he is offended.
只因心裏沒有根，不過是暫時的，及至為道遭了患難，或是受了逼迫，立刻就跌倒了。

S.FORM: Teni-râ ka ni-diri tou ad-addim-an, teni ta ti atta ka mil-lingigh ki sou, râ pæh-kbo-en pæh-dimdim ki yddarinoug-han k'atta ki si-mham-hân-appa ki vang-ei ta kmaralib ki sou, ka makka-p'euppæh ta-anna.
Tenirâ ka nidiri tou adaddiman, teni ta ti atta ka millingigh ki sou, râ pæhkboen pæhdimdim ki yddarinoughan k'atta ki simhamhânappa ki vangei ta kmaralib ki sou, ka makkap'euppæh taanna.
S.TRANSL: En die inde doornen beraeyt 1s dese 1s de gene die het woort hoort ended? forgbuldigheyt deser werelt eii de berlepdinge des rijckdoms bexsticke het woordt ende het wort onbruchtbaer.
He also that received seed among the thorns is he that heareth the word; and the care of this world, and the deceitfulness of riches, choke the word, and he becometh unfruitful.
撒在荊棘裏的，就是人聽了道，後來有世上的思慮、錢財的迷惑把道擠住了，不能結實。

S.FORM: Teni ka ni-diri tou næi ka mariang, teni ta ti atta ka dou millingigh ki sou ka moumha ki atta, ka makka-voua-appa pou-pænæh sat ka'ætoug-han ta saäsat, ninnim kyttiæn ta pani, ka touro kytti-æn ta rouma-râ.

Teni ka nidiri tou næi ka mariang, teni ta ti atta ka dou millingigh ki sou ka moumha ki atta, ka makkavouaappa poupænæh sat ka'ætoughan ta saäsat, ninnim kyttiæn ta pani, ka touro kyttiæn ta roumarâ.
S.TRANSL: Die nn in de gdede aerde beraept is dese 18 de gene die het. woort hoort n-de beslt aet die oock brucht dracght efi boort brenght de een hondert de ander csestig ende de ande; de:tighour.)
But he that received seed into the good ground is he that heareth the word, and understandeth it; which also beareth fruit, and bringeth forth, some an hundredfold, some sixty, some thirty.
撒在好地上的，就是人聽道明白了，後來結實，有一百倍的，有六十倍的，有三十倍的。＂

S.FORM: Ni-pou-pænæh neini-æn ki pani ki pæ-myh-kaulaul-'an, koun, Pæh-myh-kaulaul-'an ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vul-lum, ki ta-'u ka ni-dmadiri ki'æ'æp ka mariang tou ouma tyn.
Nipoupænæh neiniæn ki pani ki pæmyhkaulaul'an, koun, Pæhmyhkaulaul'an ta Peisasouan ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum, ki ta'u ka nidmadiri ki'æ'æp ka mariang tou ouma tyn.
S.TRANSL: Een ander gelijckenisse heeft hy haer boor-gefelt eggende Het Koninckriick der Demelen is ghelijck een mentche die goet raedt raeyde in shnen acker.
Another parable put he forth unto them, saying, The kingdom of heaven is likened unto a man which sowed good seed in his field:
耶穌又設個比喻對他們說：＂天國好像人撒好種在田裏，

S.FORM: Ka tou yrp-pen ki ta-'u, ni-iroua ta væuuh tyn, ka ni-dmiri ki ouro ka assi mariang kmi-ta-mæugh ki sivegh, ka ni-d'marang-atou-râ.
Ka tou yrppen ki ta'u, niiroua ta væuuh tyn, ka nidmiri ki ouro ka assi mariang kmitamæugh ki sivegh, ka nid'marangatourâ.
S.TRANSL: Ende als de menichen Giepen quam (ijnen byandt ende raepde onkjuydc midden in de tarwe ende gingh
But while men slept, his enemy came and sowed tares among the wheat, and went his way.
及至人睡覺的時候，有仇敵來，將稗子撒在麥子裏就走了。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-tibbig kæuh-ngnara, makka-voua, ni-mou-pænæh-appa ta ourou ka assi ma-riang.
Irou ka nitibbig kæuhngnara, makkavoua, nimoupænæhappa ta ourou ka assi mariang.
S.TRANSL: Boehetnustor)krupt -opgeschoten was efi brucht boort bracht doe openbaerde hem oock her onkrupt. '
But when the blade was sprung up, and brought forth fruit, then appeared the tares also.
到長苗吐穗的時候，稗子也顯出來。

S.FORM: Ka dou mou-qua ta koun-cia ki Tæi-tallagh, ni-k'ma tyni-æn: Meirang, assi kaua mariang ta 'æǣp ka ni-diri-en-hou tou ou-ma-'ho? makka-kounna ka akou-ourou ka assi mariang?
Ka dou mouqua ta kouncia ki Tæitallagh, nik'ma tyniæn: Meirang, assi kaua mariang ta 'æǣp ka nidirienhou tou ouma'ho? makkakounna ka akouourou ka assi mariang?
S.TRANSL: Ende de diensknechten ban den heere des huys gingen ende leyden tot hem : Heere en hebt ghp niet goct raet in uwert acker geraeyt : ban waer heeft hy dan dit onkeyre.
So the servants of the householder came and said unto him, Sir, didst not thou sow good seed in thy field? from whence then hath it tares?
田主的僕人來告訴他說：＂主啊，你不是撒好種在田裏嗎？從哪裏來的稗子呢？＂

S.FORM: Teni-râ ni-k'mâ neini-æn, Ni-pâm't-en kanna ki ta-'u ka ma-væuugh. Ka ni-k'ma ta kouncia tyni-æn, Kamoei-en-hou kaua ka ouqu'ei-mian malillud ki anna?
Tenirâ nik'mâ neiniæn, Nipâm'ten kanna ki ta'u ka mavæuugh. Ka nik'ma ta kouncia tyniæn, Kamoeienhou kaua ka ouqu'eimian malillud ki anna?
S.TRANSL: Edt hy seyde tot haer Een byandigh mensche heefc dat gedaen. Ende de dienltKknechten sepden tot hem Wilt ghy dan dat wp henen gaen esi dat selbe bergader#s
He said unto them, An enemy hath done this. The servants said unto him, Wilt thou then that we go and gather them up?
主人說：＂這是仇敵做的。＂僕人說：＂你要我們去薅出來嗎？＂

S.FORM: Râ ni-k'ma ta teni, Assi, alei ka rou malillud-kamou ki ouro ka assi mariang, assi-ah-ka-mou lava pi-apara pouh-toul ki sivægh.
Râ nik'ma ta teni, Assi, alei ka rou malilludkamou ki ouro ka assi mariang, assiahkamou lava piapara pouhtoul ki sivægh.
S.TRANSL: Maer hy sepde Neen op dat ghy het onkruydt Ãžergaderende oock moghe-lick met het selbe de tarwe nietupt en treckt.
But he said, Nay; lest while ye gather up the tares, ye root up also the wheat with them.
主人說：＂不必，恐怕薅稗子，連麥子也拔出來。

S.FORM: Pa-kæuh-sâl-au patoul tou kaäjam-eih, ka tou kidi ki kaä-jam-en pasousou-ei-mau ki ta-'u ka majam-ah, Siourou-â illud ki ourou ka assi mariang, ka ibbun-au ta anna tou ibbun, alei ka pa-pilæmæ-'æuh, rà ill'ddau ta sivæh tou kouvau-au.

Pakæuhsâlau patoul tou kaäjameih, ka tou kidi ki kaäjamen pasousoueimau ki ta'u ka majamah, Siourouâ illud ki ourou ka assi mariang, ka ibbunau ta anna tou ibbun, alei ka papilæmæ'æuh, rà ill'ddau ta sivæh tou kouvauau.
S.TRANSL: Laetse beyde te samen opwassen tot den Ooglt ende in den thdt des Ooglts sal ick tot de maepers seggen Dergadett eert dat onkyuyt ende bindt het in busselen om het selbe te berbranden : mae? de terwe brenght te lamen in myne lchuere.

Let both grow together until the harvest: and in the time of harvest I will say to the reapers, Gather ye together first the tares, and bind them in bundles to burn them: but gather the wheat into my barn.
容這兩樣一齊長，等着收割。當收割的時候，我要對收割的人說，先將稗子薅出來，捆成捆，留着燒；惟有麥子要收在倉裏。＂＂ （可4‧30－32；路13‧18－21）

S.FORM: Pani-appa ki pæ-myh-kau-laul'an ka ni-pou-pænæh-en tyn neini-æn, koun, Mama ki touhto ki s'hai (ka keiloä) ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum, ka ni-ara ki ta-'u, ka na dadiri tyn tou ouma tyn.
Paniappa ki pæmyhkaulaul'an ka nipoupænæhen tyn neiniæn, koun, Mama ki touhto ki s'hai (ka keiloä) ta Peisasouan ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum, ka niara ki ta'u, ka na dadiri tyn tou ouma tyn.
S.TRANSL: Eenander gelyckenisse heeft hy hatr boor-geltelt â€š seggende Het Koninckryck der Hemelen is ghelyck het moltaert-3aedt het welck een menlche heeft genomen ende in shnen acker geraeyt :
Another parable put he forth unto them, saying, The kingdom of heaven is like to a grain of mustard seed, which a man took, and sowed in his field:
他又設個比喻對他們說：＂天國好像一粒芥菜種，有人拿去種在田裏。

S.FORM: Ka siouro outi-kylling (ta anna) ki ymmid ki touhto: jrou-râ ni-kæuh-'mha-ato, siouro-ato irang ki ymmid ki ourouourou: ka kæuh-pærænnæh-ato, k'ma-appa-hynna ka jroua ta ajajam ka soubuh si-laulau tou pehil tyn-da.

Ka siouro outikylling (ta anna) ki ymmid ki touhto: jrourâ nikæuh'mhaato, siouroato irang ki ymmid ki ourouourou: ka kæuhpærænnæhato, k'maappahynna ka jroua ta ajajam ka soubuh silaulau tou pehil tynda.
S.TRANSL: Het welcke wel het minlte is onde? alle de raden: mae? wannee t opgewassen is dan is t het meelte ban de moes kyuyden:ende het wort een boom alfoo dat de bogelen des Hemels komen ende neftelen in ijne tacken.
Which indeed is the least of all seeds: but when it is grown, it is the greatest among herbs, and becometh a tree, so that the birds of the air come and lodge in the branches thereof.
這原是百種裏最小的，等到長起來，卻比各樣的菜都大，且成了樹，天上的飛鳥來宿在它的枝上。＂

S.FORM: Ka ni-pasousou-en tyn ki pæmyh-kaulaul-'an ka pani, Ma-ma ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum ki ni-pei-apyngit, ka ni-ara ki jna ka ni-hma tou toutouro ki sau-rarpung-an ki moé, tou kidi-appa k'anna ka ma-ymd-ato mapyngit.

Ka nipasousouen tyn ki pæmyhkaulaul'an ka pani, Mama ta Peisasouan ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum ki nipeiapyngit, ka niara ki jna ka nihma tou toutouro ki saurarpungan ki moé, tou kidiappa k'anna ka maymdato mapyngit.
S.TRANSL: Een andere gelijckenisse sprack hy tot haer (seggende, } Het Koninckryc der Nemelen 1s geliick een suerdeessem welcken een brouwe nam ende berbergde in drtematen meels tot dat Het geheel gesnert wag,
Another parable spake he unto them; The kingdom of heaven is like unto leaven, which a woman took, and hid in three measures of meal, till the whole was leavened.
他又對他們講個比喻說：＂天國好像麵酵，有婦人拿來，藏在三斗麵裏，直等全團都發起來。＂ （可4‧33－34）

S.FORM: kamamang k'atta ni-ma-sousou ta ti Jesus ki makoilalaulau tou pæmyh-kaulaul'an: ka assi ni-pasousou-en ki mamang tou aousi ki pæniyh kaulaul-'an.
kamamang k'atta nimasousou ta ti Jesus ki makoilalaulau tou pæmyhkaulaul'an: ka assi nipasousouen ki mamang tou aousi ki pæniyh kaulaul'an.
S.TRANSL: Alle dese dingen het Jesus tot de icharen gelproken door gelijckenissen : ende fonder gelyjckenifseen sprack hp tot hae: met.
All these things spake Jesus unto the multitude in parables; and without a parable spake he not unto them:
這都是耶穌用比喻對眾人說的話；若不用比喻，就不對他們說甚麼。

S.FORM: Alei ka pavæut-aul-ato ta na sou ki Tama-mattæ'i-tan, koun, Luhtoäs-ei-mau ta moutos au tou pæmyh-kaulaul-'an: Pou-pænæh-ei-mau ta ni-hâ na kidi ki ni-pa-itou-samding-en ta daroun ki ym-mid ki Næi.
Alei ka pavæutaulato ta na sou ki Tamamattæ'itan, koun, Luhtoäseimau ta moutos au tou pæmyhkaulaul'an: Poupænæheimau ta nihâ na kidi ki nipaitousamdingen ta daroun ki ymmid ki Næi.
S.TRANSL: Opdat berbult foude worden dat gesproken 1s door denPropheet seggende Ick sal mijnt mont op doen doo? gelijckenissen : Ick sal boort brenghen dinghen die berborghen waren. ban de gront-legginge der werelt.
That it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the prophet, saying, I will open my mouth in parables; I will utter things which have been kept secret from the foundation of the world.
這是要應驗先知的話，說：

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-padarang ki makoi-lalaulau, ni-mou-tallagh ta ti Jesus. Ka ni-iroua tyni-æn ta Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn, koun, Pat-tæ'i-msing-i-kame ki pæmyh-kaul-aul-'an ki ourourou ka assi mariang tou uouma.
Irou ka nipadarang ki makoilalaulau, nimoutallagh ta ti Jesus. Ka niiroua tyniæn ta Pæhtatæutæuhan tyn, koun, Pattæ'imsingikame ki pæmyhkaulaul'an ki ourourou ka assi mariang tou uouma.
S.TRANSL: Doe nu Jesus de scharen(ao hem) gelaten hadde ging hy na hups. Ende lijne Discipelen quamen tot hem seggende Verklaert ons de gelyckenisse ban't onkrupt des ackers.
Then Jesus sent the multitude away, and went into the house: and his disciples came unto him, saying, Declare unto us the parable of the tares of the field.
當下，耶穌離開眾人，進了房子。他的門徒進前來，說：＂請把田間稗子的比喻講給我們聽。＂

S.FORM: Teni ta ni-mattæ'i-vli ma-sousou neini-æn, Teni ka dmadiri ki 'æǣp ka mariang, teni ta Alak ki ka'æuloung.
Teni ta nimattæ'ivli masousou neiniæn, Teni ka dmadiri ki 'æǣp ka mariang, teni ta Alak ki ka'æuloung.
S.TRANSL: Endehp antwoordende sepde tot haer Die t goet raet raept 1s de Sone des WMenschen.
He answered and said unto them, He that soweth the good seed is the Son of man;
他回答說：＂那撒好種的就是人子；

S.FORM: Ka ouma ta ymmid ka Næi: æ'ǣp ka mariang-da ta alalak ki Pei-sasou-an: râ ourou ka assi mariang ta alalak ki Tama-paka-t'e (ka Lyttou.)
Ka ouma ta ymmid ka Næi: æ'ǣp ka mariangda ta alalak ki Peisasouan: râ ourou ka assi mariang ta alalak ki Tamapakat'e (ka Lyttou.)
S.TRANSL: Ende de acker 18 de werelt : ende het goede raedt zijn de kinder? des Koninckrijcks : ende het onkrupdt 3yn de kinderen des Boolen.
The field is the world; the good seed are the children of the kingdom; but the tares are the children of the wicked one;
田地就是世界；好種就是天國之子；稗子就是那惡者之子；

S.FORM: Râ væuæuh ka ni-dmiri ki anna, teni ta Lyttou: ka kaäjam-an ta kæuh-kahan kæuh-limouli-mou ki yddarynnoug-an: râ ta-'u ka maäjam Tama-gnau ta neni.
Râ væuæuh ka nidmiri ki anna, teni ta Lyttou: ka kaäjaman ta kæuhkahan kæuhlimoulimou ki yddarynnougan: râ ta'u ka maäjam Tamagnau ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Ende de Dyandt die het selbe geraeyt heeft is de Dupbel: ende de Ooglt is de boleyndinge der werelt: ende de Maeyers mn deEngelen.
The enemy that sowed them is the devil; the harvest is the end of the world; and the reapers are the angels.
撒稗子的仇敵就是魔鬼；收割的時候就是世界的末了；收割的人就是天使。

S.FORM: Anna ta mama ka palil'd-den ta ourou ka assi mariang, ka pa-pillalamæh-in ki apoei, kma-al-ap-pa-hynna tou kæuh-kahan kæuh-limoulimou ki yddarynnoug-an.
Anna ta mama ka palil'dden ta ourou ka assi mariang, ka papillalamæhin ki apoei, kmaalappahynna tou kæuhkahan kæuhlimoulimou ki yddarynnougan.
S.TRANSL: Gelijckerwijs dan het onkrupdt bergadert mde mermet bper berbrant wordt also sal het (oock) 3hn in de bolepndinge deser werelt.
As therefore the tares are gathered and burned in the fire; so shall it be in the end of this world.
將稗子薅出來用火焚燒，世界的末了也要如此。

S.FORM: Ka madingi-ah ta Alak ki ka-'æuloung ki Tama-gnau tyn, ka papalillud-ah tou Pei-sasou-an tyn ymmid ki paka-varau-en kmæu-eirau, ki pamut-appa ki katoukoul-an:
Ka madingiah ta Alak ki ka'æuloung ki Tamagnau tyn, ka papalilludah tou Peisasouan tyn ymmid ki pakavarauen kmæueirau, ki pamutappa ki katoukoulan:
S.TRANSL: Be Zone des Menschen sal shne Engelenuptsenden ende sy sullenupt sn Koninckrhck bergaderen alle de egernilecen ende de gene die de ongerechtigheyt doen:
The Son of man shall send forth his angels, and they shall gather out of his kingdom all things that offend, and them which do iniquity;
人子要差遣使者，把一切叫人跌倒的和作惡的，從他國裏挑出來，

S.FORM: Ka'aring-an-ei nein smaki-qua neini-æn tou tatoulou-an ki apoei: tou hynna-al-ato ta tangi-tangi-en ki patit-ing-en appa ki waligh.
Ka'aringanei nein smakiqua neiniæn tou tatoulouan ki apoei: tou hynnaalato ta tangitangien ki patitingen appa ki waligh.
S.TRANSL: Endesullen deselbein den byerigen oben werpen : daer sal weeninge zijn ende Knersinge der tanden.
And shall cast them into a furnace of fire: there shall be wailing and gnashing of teeth.
丟在火爐裏；在那裏必要哀哭切齒了。

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna matika-nag-ah ta matiktik mama ki wæ'ï tou Pei-sasou-an ki Rama nein. Timaman ta akou-tangira tou il-ling-han, illing-hau-ra.
Tou kidi k'anna matikanagah ta matiktik mama ki wæ'ï tou Peisasouan ki Rama nein. Timaman ta akoutangira tou illinghan, illinghaura.
S.TRANSL: Dan sullen de rerhtbeerdige bhncken gelyck de sonne in het Koninckrijck haers Yaders, Die ooren heeft om te hoort dic hoore.
Then shall the righteous shine forth as the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Who hath ears to hear, let him hear.
那時，義人在他們父的國裏，要發出光來，像太陽一樣。有耳可聽的，就應當聽！＂

S.FORM: Mila, mama ki kavangei-an ka ni-hâ tou ouma ta Pei-sasau-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum, ka rou paki-valei-en ki ta-'u, ha-in tyn ta anna, ka alei ki karaj-en ki rÿh oukoun tyn pasa-dimma ki mamang tyn, ka peila ki ouma k'anna.

Mila, mama ki kavangeian ka nihâ tou ouma ta Peisasauan ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum, ka rou pakivaleien ki ta'u, hain tyn ta anna, ka alei ki karajen ki rÿh oukoun tyn pasadimma ki mamang tyn, ka peila ki ouma k'anna.
S.TRANSL: Wederom 1s het koninckriick de: Hemel? gelijk cen ichat in DE acker berborgen welcken een mensche gebonden hebbende berbergde (dien, ) ende ban blijdttchap obe? dt selben gaet hy henen efi berkoopt al wat hy heeft ende koopt dien (eibt acker.
Again, the kingdom of heaven is like unto treasure hid in a field; the which when a man hath found, he hideth, and for joy thereof goeth and selleth all that he hath, and buyeth that field.
＂天國好像寶貝藏在地裏，人遇見了就把它藏起來，歡歡喜喜地去變賣一切所有的，買這塊地。

S.FORM: Mila, mama ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum ki Tama-peila, ka kmiym ki vahto ka mæænnigh ka tæ'i-qua tou koudo:
Mila, mama ta Peisasouan ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum ki Tamapeila, ka kmiym ki vahto ka mæænnigh ka tæ'iqua tou koudo:
S.TRANSL: Wederom 1s het Koninckryc> der Hemtlen gelyk een Koopman die schoone pecrlen orckt :
Again, the kingdom of heaven is like unto a merchant man, seeking goodly pearls:
天國又好像買賣人尋找好珠子，

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-paki-valei tyn ta saäsat ki vahto ka mangal, ou-koun tyn pa-ymmid pa-sa-dimma ki maman tyn, ka peil-'an tyn ta anna.
Ka rou nipakivalei tyn ta saäsat ki vahto ka mangal, oukoun tyn paymmid pasadimma ki maman tyn, ka peil'an tyn ta anna.
S.TRANSL: Dewcelcke hebbende een perrle ban groote weerde gebonden ging henen ende er berkocht al wat hy hadde ende kocht deselbe,
Who, when he had found one pearl of great price, went and sold all that he had, and bought it.
遇見一顆重價的珠子，就去變賣他一切所有的，買了這顆珠子。

S.FORM: Mil-'appa, mama ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vul-lum ki kakæuæur ka ni pou-vaoung-en, ka ullud ki ymmid ki nanang ki thing:
Mil'appa, mama ta Peisasouan ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum ki kakæuæur ka ni pouvaoungen, ka ullud ki ymmid ki nanang ki thing:
S.TRANSL: Wederom is het Koninckryck der Hemelen ghehiick ren net geworpen in de Zee ende dat allerlep soorten (ban bisschen)t'samen brengt:
Again, the kingdom of heaven is like unto a net, that was cast into the sea, and gathered of every kind:
天國又好像網撒在海裏，聚攏各樣水族，

S.FORM: Ka rou ouh-tmoei-in ta atta hyh-pa-pourough-in (ki Ta-ma-oudlum) tou tæitah (ki ra-loum), ka rou myrroung, sakou-peri-en nein ki mariang pou-qua tou sato, râ ka aryng-nein ta assi mariang.
Ka rou ouhtmoeiin ta atta hyhpapouroughin (ki Tamaoudlum) tou tæitah (ki raloum), ka rou myrroung, sakouperien nein ki mariang pouqua tou sato, râ ka aryngnein ta assi mariang.
S.TRANSL: Het welcke wanneer het bol gheworden ts ( de biffchers } aen den oeber optxerken ende neder sittende lesen het goede uyt in (hare ) baten mae? het quade werpen sh wegh.
Which, when it was full, they drew to shore, and sat down, and gathered the good into vessels, but cast the bad away.
網既滿了，人就拉上岸來，坐下，揀好的收在器具裏，將不好的丟棄了。

S.FORM: K'ma-al-ato-hynna tou kæuh-kahan kæuh-limou-limou ki yddarynnoung-an: sah-pænæ-'ah ta Tama-gnau, ka pa-pæ-hpiæh-ah ki assi mariang na tou tamæugh ki matiktik:
K'maalatohynna tou kæuhkahan kæuhlimoulimou ki yddarynnoungan: sahpænæ'ah ta Tamagnau, ka papæhpiæhah ki assi mariang na tou tamæugh ki matiktik:
S.TRANSL: Alsoo lal het in de bolepndinge der eeuwen wesen: de Engelen fullen uptgaen ende de boosen uyt het midden der rechtbeerdighe afschepden :
So shall it be at the end of the world: the angels shall come forth, and sever the wicked from among the just,
世界的末了也要這樣。天使要出來，從義人中把惡人分別出來，

S.FORM: Ka'aring-ei nein smaki-qua neini-æn tou tatoulou-an ki apoei: tou hynna-al-ato ta tangi-tangi-en ki patiting-en-appa ki waligh.
Ka'aringei nein smakiqua neiniæn tou tatoulouan ki apoei: tou hynnaalato ta tangitangien ki patitingenappa ki waligh.
S.TRANSL: Endesullen deselbein den byerigen oben werpen : daer sal zijn weeningheende Knersinghe der tanden.
And shall cast them into the furnace of fire: there shall be wailing and gnashing of teeth.
丟在火爐裏；在那裏必要哀哭切齒了。＂

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus nei-ni-æn, Mou-ymmid-kamou kaua mou-mha ki atta? Ni-k'ma (ta neni) tyni-æn, Hahei Meirang.
Ka nik'ma ta ti Jesus neiniæn, Mouymmidkamou kaua moumha ki atta? Nik'ma (ta neni) tyniæn, Hahei Meirang.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus leyde tot Haer Hebt ghy dit alles berstaen : Sp sepden tot hem
Jesus saith unto them, Have ye understood all these things? They say unto him, Yea, Lord.
耶穌說：＂這一切的話你們都明白了嗎？＂他們說：＂我們明白了。＂

S.FORM: Teni râ ni-k'ma neini-æn: Anna ta ymmid ki Makou-sasoulat ka ni-pæhtatæutæu-en tou Pei-sa-sou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vul-lum, mama ta teni ki Tæ'ï-tallagh ka pou-pænæh ki vangei tyn ki vææu ki ri'é-appa.
Teni râ nik'ma neiniæn: Anna ta ymmid ki Makousasoulat ka nipæhtatæutæuen tou Peisasouan ki tounnoun ki vulluvullum, mama ta teni ki Tæ'ïtallagh ka poupænæh ki vangei tyn ki vææu ki ri'éappa.
S.TRANSL: Ende hy eyde haer : Daeromeenygelick Schaiftgeleerde in het Koninckrijck der Hemelen onderwesen is geliick een heere des huys die uyt sijnen schat nieuwe ende oude dinghen boort brenght.
Then said he unto them, Therefore every scribe which is instructed unto the kingdom of heaven is like unto a man that is an householder, which bringeth forth out of his treasure things new and old.
他說：＂凡文士受教作天國的門徒，就像一個家主從他庫裏拿出新舊的東西來。＂ （可6‧1－6；路4‧16－30）

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma-hynna, rou ni-mattæ'i-kaha ta ti Jesus ki pæmyh-kaulaul-'an k'anna, ka ni-d'marang hynna.
Ka nik'mahynna, rou nimattæ'ikaha ta ti Jesus ki pæmyhkaulaul'an k'anna, ka nid'marang hynna.
S.TRANSL: Ende het is geschiet als Jesus dese gelijckenislen ge-eyndight hadde bertrock hy ban daer. w
And it came to pass, that when Jesus had finished these parables, he departed thence.
耶穌說完了這些比喻，就離開那裏，

S.FORM: Ka rou irou-'ato tou pou-rough ki Rama tyn, ni-matæu-tæuuh neini-æn tou Pæu'i-sasâl-an nein, k'ma-hynna ka ni-mouh-kiap ta neni mattæ'i-k'ma-hynna, Mak-ka-kounna tyni-æn ta kakousa-cyng-an k'atta ki kailgh-en-appa?
Ka rou irou'ato tou pourough ki Rama tyn, nimatæutæuuh neiniæn tou Pæu'isasâlan nein, k'mahynna ka nimouhkiap ta neni mattæ'ik'mahynna, Makkakounna tyniæn ta kakousacyngan k'atta ki kailghenappa?
S.TRANSL: Ende gekomen zijnde in fiin baderlandt leerde hy'se in hare Synagoge oo dat ly hae: onilsetceden ende sepden Yan waer(komc)defen die wyshepdt ende die krachten +
And when he was come into his own country, he taught them in their synagogue, insomuch that they were astonished, and said, Whence hath this man this wisdom, and these mighty works?
來到自己的家鄉，在會堂裏教訓人，甚至他們都希奇，說：＂這人從哪裏有這等智慧和異能呢？

S.FORM: Assi kaua Alak ta ti atta ki Soihoe? assi kaua pananang-en ta ti jna tyn ti Maria? ki tæ'i-appa-râppa tyn ta ti Jakobus, ti Joses, ti Simon, ti Judas?
Assi kaua Alak ta ti atta ki Soihoe? assi kaua pananangen ta ti jna tyn ti Maria? ki tæ'iapparâppa tyn ta ti Jakobus, ti Joses, ti Simon, ti Judas?
S.TRANSL: Js dese niet de fone des timmermans + ende is sine moeder niet genaemt Marta ende (ijne broeders Jacobus ende Joles ende Simon ende Judage
Is not this the carpenter's son? is not his mother called Mary? and his brethren, James, and Joses, and Simon, and Judas?
這不是木匠的兒子嗎？他母親不是叫馬利亞嗎？他弟兄們不是叫雅各、約西 、 西門、猶大嗎？

S.FORM: Ki niæǣ-appa tyn, assi kaua æia-ymmid æia-lam ymyt'æn? Makka kounna tyni-æn ta ymmid ki mamang k'atta?
Ki niæǣappa tyn, assi kaua æiaymmid æialam ymyt'æn? Makka kounna tyniæn ta ymmid ki mamang k'atta?
S.TRANSL: Ende ijne sifters zijnfe met alle by ons-Dan waer {komt) dan desen dit alles
And his sisters, are they not all with us? Whence then hath this man all these things?
他妹妹們不是都在我們這裏嗎？這人從哪裏有這一切的事呢？＂

S.FORM: Ka ni-sai-sala-kouap tyni-æn (paka-t'e neini-æn mamado). Râ ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Aousi ki rikour-in loumoulugh ta Tama-mattæi-tan, dyk tou pou-rough tyn, tou tallagh-appa-tyn.
Ka nisaisalakouap tyniæn (pakat'e neiniæn mamado). Râ nik'ma ta ti Jesus neiniæn, Aousi ki rikourin loumoulugh ta Tamamattæitan, dyk tou pourough tyn, tou tallaghappatyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende sy wierden aen hem ge-ergert. Maer Jesus leyde tot hatr Een Propheet en is niet onge-eert dan in syn Yaderlandt ende in shn huys.
And they were offended in him. But Jesus said unto them, A prophet is not without honour, save in his own country, and in his own house.
他們就厭棄他。耶穌對他們說：＂大凡先知，除了本地本家之外，沒有不被人尊敬的。＂

S.FORM: Ka assi tyn ni-pastæu ma-dagh ki maligh ka ring-ei tou hyn-na, alei ki kaurouan nein tna-msing. Ka sasat kytti-æn'æb' ki pat ki lbæh ki soulat.
Ka assi tyn nipastæu madagh ki maligh ka ringei tou hynna, alei ki kaurouan nein tnamsing. Ka sasat kyttiæn'æb' ki pat ki lbæh ki soulat.
S.TRANSL: Ende hy en herft aldaer niet bele krachten ghedaen ban weghen haer ongeloobe,
And he did not many mighty works there because of their unbelief.
耶穌因為他們不信，就在那裏不多行異能了。
